Fresh Fresh Herbs in Shabiya 11 أعشاب طازجة طازج في Shabiya 11

Daily-use herbs for home cooking, Arabic, Indian, and international recipes. From basil and thyme to curry leaves and dill, our herb selection brings authentic flavor to every dish you prepare. أعشاب للاستخدام اليومي في الطبخ المنزلي، الوصفات العربية والهندية والعالمية. من الريحان والزعتر إلى أوراق الكاري والشبت، تشكيلتنا من الأعشاب تضيف نكهة أصيلة لكل طبق تعده.

As a locally owned produce shop, we understand the needs of families, restaurants, and food businesses in this community. Shabiya 11 offers affordable housing and a tight-knit community atmosphere. KA Fresh serves residents with budget-friendly fresh produce, bulk orders, and reliable delivery throughout the neighborhood. يخدم KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables Shabiya 11 بفخر بـ أعشاب طازجة الطازج يوميًا. بصفتنا متجر منتجات مملوك محليًا، نفهم احتياجات العائلات والمطاعم والشركات الغذائية في هذا المجتمع. شابية 11 توفر سكناً بأسعار معقولة وأجواء مجتمعية متماسكة. كيه أي فريش يخدم السكان بمنتجات طازجة بأسعار معقولة وطلبات بالجملة وتوصيل موثوق في جميع أنحاء الحي.

Fresh Herbs Pricing in Shabiya 11 أسعار أعشاب طازجة في Shabiya 11

Common Herbs أعشاب شائعة AED 2 - 10 (per bunch) 2 - 10 درهم إماراتي (لكل باقة)
Specialty Herbs أعشاب متخصصة AED 5 - 25 (per bunch) 5 - 25 درهم إماراتي (لكل باقة)
Bulk Herb Packs أعشاب بالجملة AED 10 - 40 (per pack) 10 - 40 درهم إماراتي (لكل عبوة)

Prices are indicative and may vary based on seasonality and market rates. Call +971 54 580 1898 for today's exact prices. الأسعار تقريبية وقد تختلف بناءً على الموسمية وأسعار السوق. اتصل على +971 54 580 1898 للحصول على الأسعار الدقيقة اليوم.

How We Prepare Fresh Herbs كيف نحضر أعشاب طازجة

Our process ensures you always receive the freshest, highest-quality produce. تضمن عمليتنا حصولك دائمًا على أ freshest وأجود المنتجات.

1

Specialty Sourcing توريد متخصص

We source both common and hard-to-find herbs from local growers and specialist importers across the region. نحن نورد الأعشاب الشائعة والنادرة من المزارعين المحليين والموردين المتخصصين في جميع أنحاء المنطقة.

2

Fragrance & Freshness Check فحص الرائحة والطزاجة

Every herb batch is checked for vibrant color, strong aroma, and healthy leaves before acceptance. يتم فحص كل دفعة أعشاب للتحقق من اللون النابض بالحياة والرائحة القوية والأوراق الصحية قبل القبول.

3

Gentle Handling تعامل لطيف

Delicate herbs are handled with care and stored in conditions that preserve their essential oils and aroma. يتم التعامل مع الأعشاب الحساسة بعناية وتخزينها في ظروف تحافظ على زيوتها العطرية ورائحتها.

4

Recipe-Ready جاهز للوصفات

Find all the herbs you need for Arabic, Indian, Asian, and Western cuisines. Fresh flavor in every leaf. اعثر على جميع الأعشاب التي تحتاجها للمطابخ العربية والهندية والآسيوية والغربية. نكهة طازجة في كل ورقة.

What Our Customers Say

4.9 out of 5 based on 8 reviews

The freshest fruits I have found in MBZ City. The mangoes are always perfectly ripe and the vegetables last much longer than what I used to buy from the supermarket. Highly recommend KA Fresh!

Fatima Al-Hassan May 15, 2026

We order bulk vegetables for our cafeteria every week and KA Fresh never disappoints. The quality is consistent, the prices are fair, and the delivery is always on time. Great local business.

Mohammed Khan May 22, 2026

As a restaurant owner in Shabiya, I rely on KA Fresh for daily produce supply. Their restaurant supply service is excellent: fresh ingredients every morning, competitive wholesale prices, and reliable delivery.

Rajesh Patel June 1, 2026

Frequently Asked Questions about Fresh Herbs in Shabiya 11 الأسئلة الشائعة حول أعشاب طازجة في Shabiya 11

Is KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables licensed?
Yes. KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables is a registered Limited Liability Company in Abu Dhabi. Trade name reserved with Abu Dhabi Registration and Licensing Authority under activity 4721001. We operate under the activity "Retail Sale of Fresh Fruits and Vegetables."
What areas does KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables serve?
We proudly serve Mohammed Bin Zayed City, Musaffah, Mussafah Shabiya, and the greater Abu Dhabi area. We offer in-store shopping, pre-order pickup, and delivery across these communities. Visit our service areas page for a complete list.
What are your business hours?
We are open daily from 7:00 AM to 12:00 AM, including weekends and public holidays. You can visit us anytime for fresh produce, or place a pre-order for quick pickup.
Do you offer home delivery?
Yes, we offer fresh produce delivery across MBZ City, Musaffah, and Mussafah Shabiya. Delivery fees vary by location and order size. Bulk orders and restaurant accounts may qualify for free delivery. Call +971 54 580 1898 to arrange delivery.
Do you supply restaurants and cafeterias?
Absolutely. We supply fresh fruits and vegetables to restaurants, catering kitchens, cafeterias, and food businesses across Abu Dhabi. We offer wholesale pricing, scheduled daily deliveries, and customized orders based on your menu needs.
How quickly can you deliver to Shabiya 11?
We typically deliver to Shabiya 11 within 30-35 minutes. For pre-orders, you can schedule a convenient pickup or delivery time. Call +971 54 580 1898 to place your order.
Do you charge extra for delivery to Shabiya 11?
No. Shabiya 11 is within our standard delivery area. Delivery fees are based on order size, not distance within our service radius. Orders above AED 100 often qualify for free delivery.
How much does fresh herbs cost at KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables?
Our fresh herbs pricing is competitive and based on current market rates. Common Herbs: AED 2-10 per bunch. Specialty Herbs: AED 5-25 per bunch. Bulk Herb Packs: AED 10-40 per pack. Call +971 54 580 1898 for today's prices and availability.
Is fresh herbs available for delivery in Shabiya 11?
Yes, we offer fresh herbs delivery throughout Shabiya 11 and surrounding areas. Place your order by phone or WhatsApp at +971 54 580 1898 and we will deliver fresh to your door.
KA Fresh Fruits & Vegetables

Farm-fresh, every day. Fresh produce shop in MBZ City, Abu Dhabi. Daily fresh fruits, vegetables, leafy greens, herbs, and seasonal produce for homes, restaurants, and kitchens.
